overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from GTA V showing a nighttime walk along a wet city sidewalk next to a busy multi-lane road. The scene features reflective pavement under streetlights, passing vehicles including a semi-truck and police car, and urban infrastructure transitioning from a highway retaining wall to an open area with a large illuminated billboard and classical building.

scene_state.functional_zone: sidewalk alongside elevated highway with retaining wall

events.description: large semi-truck with 'BIG' logo passes by on the right side of the road

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk next to the concrete retaining wall

notable_agents.action: large semi-truck with 'BIG' branding driving past on the multi-lane road

entered.detail: tall concrete sound barrier wall with chain-link fence on top running parallel to the sidewalk
tall street light casting yellow-orange illumination on the wet pavement
multi-lane asphalt road with red curb line and moving traffic

segments.scene_description: The segment begins with a first-person walk along a narrow sidewalk bordered by a high concrete retaining wall on the left and a busy multi-lane road on the right. Streetlights cast a yellow glow on the wet reflective pavement as vehicles, including a large semi-truck, pass by on the road.

scene_state.functional_zone: sidewalk approaching highway overpass with pedestrian activity

events.description: passing pedestrians walking in the opposite direction on the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: continuing along the sidewalk, passing pedestrians walking in the opposite direction

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in blue jacket walking toward the camera on the sidewalk

entered.detail: green fire hydrant located on the edge of the sidewalk near the curb
covered bus stop shelter visible ahead on the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The walk continues along the retaining wall as the camera passes pedestrians walking in the opposite direction. A green fire hydrant and trash can appear on the sidewalk, and a bus stop shelter becomes visible in the distance as the camera approaches a highway overpass.

events.description: police car with flashing lights passes by on the road to the right
passing a pedestrian walking ahead in the same direction under the overpass

agents.ego_description: walking under the overpass, passing a pedestrian and observing traffic including a police car

notable_agents.action: police car with flashing red and blue lights driving past on the road

entered.detail: concrete highway overpass creating a covered, darker area over the sidewalk
beige electrical utility box on the sidewalk near the overpass

segments.scene_description: The camera passes under a highway overpass, entering a darker, sheltered area. A police car with flashing lights drives past on the right, and the camera overtakes a pedestrian walking ahead. The retaining wall recedes into the distance as the environment opens up slightly.

scene_state.functional_zone: open urban area with large billboard and civic building

events.description: emerging from under overpass into open area with large illuminated billboard becoming prominent

agents.ego_description: walking toward a large illuminated billboard and classical building, continuing along the path

entered.detail: massive illuminated billboard displaying 'The New American Dream' with three figures in suits
large civic building with classical columns and illuminated facade visible behind the billboard
white concrete jersey barriers lining the left side of the walkway

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the overpass, the scene opens into a wider urban area dominated by a massive illuminated billboard advertising 'The New American Dream.' Behind it stands an impressive classical building with columns. The camera continues forward along a path lined with concrete barriers, approaching the billboard as the retaining wall and overpass recede behind.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person walk along a wet city sidewalk that transitions from a confined corridor into an open urban plaza. It begins beside a high concrete retaining wall under the yellow glow of streetlights, moving past a busy multi-lane road where a large semi-truck passes over reflective pavement. As the camera continues forward, it passes pedestrians and street furniture like a green fire hydrant before entering the darker, sheltered space beneath a highway overpass. The scene then shifts as a police car with flashing lights drives by and the camera overtakes a pedestrian, causing the retaining wall to recede as the environment opens up. Finally, the camera emerges from the overpass into a wide area dominated by a massive illuminated billboard for The New American Dream and a classical building with columns.
